标题:
Top Version GUCCI 24/ Autumn-Winter New Horsebit Boots.  
Classic and versatile series, showcased by many influencers. Each design is iconic.  
Side zipper for easy wear and removal. Excellent foot wrapping!  
Elastic lambskin shaft fits snugly.  
✔️ Material: Original custom lambskin  
✔️ Lining: Cowhide  
✔️ Sole: Italian double-layer genuine leather  
✔️ Sizes: 35-40 (size 40 made-to-order, no returns)  
Comes with full official gift box packaging!

Gucci Latest Double G Monogram Thick Sole Wedge Horsebit Loafers Small Leather Shoes

Original design inspired by classic brand elements, these refined horsebit loafers exude timeless elegance. Smooth leather pairs perfectly with light gold-tone hardware. The wedge heel adds a fresh, distinctive touch to the classic style.

Material: Original custom imported top-grain cowhide  
Lining: Original custom soft lambskin  
Outsole: Original molded non-slip rubber  
Heel height: 5.5 cm (heel) / 4 cm (front)  
Sizes: Women’s 35-40
